title: ReEnchanted Books [x32] by Wh0.Car8s
description: It's a Texture Pack for all enchanted books which based on Faithful's x32 texture of a book.
body:
Vanilla-like texture pack for Enchanted Books in 32x32 resolution. It's based on Faithful's[x32] texture of a book and works on Vanilla 1.21.5+ version without any additional mods.
